metadata.description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding and finance decisions. Eight skills across two profiles (coding and financial) route your agent to TruVerifAI's MCP server — audit / deliberate / synthesize per profile, plus shared record-outcome and skip-gate — where four frontier models reason independently and conflict-target each other's positions. Coding adds proactive PreToolUse review gates that prompt an audit before risky commits and a deliberation or synthesize before risky design changes.

plugins.name: panel-review
plugins.description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding and finance decisions
